testcase.name: authenticate via JSON-RPC and persist storageState
Step 8 API business rules via Odoo JSON-RPC (E2E=No) › @api @positive validates billing total equals billing line subtotals

property.name: skip
property.value: No billing records with billing_line_ids found; cannot assert billing total consistency.

testcase.name: Step 8 API business rules via Odoo JSON-RPC (E2E=No) › @api @negative blocks cross-user record access

property.name: skip
property.value: Set ODOO_SECONDARY_USER and ODOO_SECONDARY_PASSWORD to execute cross-user isolation assertion.

testcase.name: Step 8 boundary bug hunter (InvalidOrBoundaryInput, E2E=No) › @api @negative TC-PRESCRIPTIONS-NEG-002 | prescription line quantity must not be zero or negative

failure.message: APP DEFECT: healthplix.prescription.line accepted invalid quantity (prescription line quantity must not be zero or negative). File in 06_bugs/Jira.

testcase.name: Coverage contract: scenarios and cases › @regression each case maps to a valid scenario and linked requirement
Coverage contract: scenarios and cases › @regression each scenario has at least one mapped case
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-PATIENTS-NEG-001 | Patients | Block patient creation when required name is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-PATIENTS-NEG-002 | Patients | Prevent duplicate identity document for different patient records
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-PATIENTS-NEG-003 | Patients | Prevent unauthorized access to another patient profile
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @positive TC-PATIENTS-POS-001 | Patients | Create patient with valid demographic and identity data
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-DOCTORS-NEG-001 | Doctors | Block doctor profile creation when required name is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-DOCTORS-NEG-002 | Doctors | Reject invalid boundary value for experience years
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-DOCTORS-NEG-003 | Doctors | Prevent assignment of inactive doctor in appointment flow
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @positive TC-DOCTORS-POS-001 | Doctors | Create active doctor profile for downstream assignment
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-APPOINTMENTS-NEG-001 | Appointments | Block appointment save when required doctor is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-APPOINTMENTS-NEG-002 | Appointments | Block appointment save when required appointment date is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-APPOINTMENTS-NEG-003 | Appointments | Prevent double-booking for same doctor and time slot
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @positive TC-APPOINTMENTS-POS-001 | Appointments | Create appointment with valid patient doctor and date
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-PRESCRIPTIONS-NEG-001 | Prescriptions | Block prescription save when required patient is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-PRESCRIPTIONS-NEG-002 | Prescriptions | Reject prescription line with zero or negative quantity

Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-PRESCRIPTIONS-NEG-003 | Prescriptions | Enforce allergy or interaction fail-safe before finalizing prescription
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @positive TC-PRESCRIPTIONS-POS-001 | Prescriptions | Create prescription with valid lines and dosing instructions
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-LABREPORTS-NEG-001 | Lab Reports | Block lab report save when required patient is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-LABREPORTS-NEG-002 | Lab Reports | Block lab report save when required date is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-LABREPORTS-NEG-003 | Lab Reports | Prevent wrong-patient lab result attachment
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @positive TC-LABREPORTS-POS-001 | Lab Reports | Create lab report with valid required and referral fields
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-IPDDETAILS-NEG-001 | IPD Details | Prevent assigning occupied bed to a second active IPD case
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-IPDDETAILS-NEG-002 | IPD Details | Prevent active-treatment update after discharge status
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-IPDDETAILS-NEG-003 | IPD Details | Prevent linking IPD admission to unrelated patient context
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @positive TC-IPDDETAILS-POS-001 | IPD Details | Create valid IPD admission with doctor ward and bed assignment
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-BILLING-NEG-001 | Billing | Block billing save when required patient is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-BILLING-NEG-002 | Billing | Reject negative billing line amount
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-BILLING-NEG-003 | Billing | Prevent duplicate billing line for same service event
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @positive TC-BILLING-POS-001 | Billing | Create billing with valid lines and accurate total
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @negative TC-WARDMANAGEMENT-NEG-001 | Ward Management | Block ward creation when required ward name is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @negative TC-WARDMANAGEMENT-NEG-002 | Ward Management | Block ward creation when required ward type is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @negative TC-WARDMANAGEMENT-NEG-003 | Ward Management | Prevent workflow usage of incomplete ward configuration
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @positive TC-WARDMANAGEMENT-POS-001 | Ward Management | Create valid ward master for bed allocation planning
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-BEDMANAGEMENT-NEG-001 | Bed Management | Block bed creation when required bed number is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-BEDMANAGEMENT-NEG-002 | Bed Management | Block bed creation when required ward is missing
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @smoke @negative TC-BEDMANAGEMENT-NEG-003 | Bed Management | Prevent assigning one bed to multiple active patients
Data-driven FE execution from test_cases.csv (scope=all) › @regression @positive TC-BEDMANAGEMENT-POS-001 | Bed Management | Create bed with valid ward linkage and status
